arts.ttl: 'Nearly there': Rodgers reflects on failing to sign John McGinn for Celtic
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers has reflected on failing to sign John McGinn during his first spell at the club.

arts.ttl: 'Official': Fabrizio Romano says what he knows about Arsenal and Ollie Watkins after £60m bid was made
Aston Villa vs Celtic LIVE: Champions League updates, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Huge Battle of Britain at Villa Park

arts.ttl: Alex Valle bids Celtic farewell in Instagram statement, Hoops stars react
arts.sum: Alex Valle shared a heartfelt goodbye with Celtic fans But that has not stopped the 20-year-old from enjoying every minute of his time as a Celtic player where he made his Champions League debut and provided THAT assist in a mauling of St Johnstone.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Celtic LIVE as Stan Collymore makes plea amid rising tensions in Birmingham
arts.sum: It's a massive clash in Europe's elite competition as Villa and the Hoops round off the league phase on what is a mouthwatering prospect

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen complete loan signing of Aston Villa's Emiliano Buendía
arts.sum: "The Bundesliga really appeals to me and Leverkusen are the defending champions and, for me, one of the best and most interesting teams in Europe right now," explained Buendía. Buendía, 28, makes the switch to the defending Bundesliga champions as a direct replacement for Martin Terrier, who was recently ruled out for the rest of the campaign with a torn Achilles.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Aston Villa confirm transfer as £17m clause revealed
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen have signed Aston Villa's Emi Buendia on loan with an option to buy. Buendia's new deal with Villa will see him contracted at the club until 2027, though he could depart in the summer on a permanent basis if Leverkusen take up their chance to sign him.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Celtic LIVE match updates and team news from Champions League clash
arts.sum: Scottish champions Celtic have already secured their place in the knockout play-offs after beating BSC Young Boys last week, while Villa lost 1-0 at AS Monaco. If they were to beat Celtic tonight, they'd need one of Atletico Madrid, AC Milan, Atalanta or Bayer Leverkusen to fail to win their final league phase games to bank automatic qualification for the round of 16.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa's £59m transfer target Jhon Duran told he is 'not a serious footballer'
arts.sum: He's 21 years of age, at the beginning of his career, with all the world in front of him, playing in the best league, for a big football club and he wants to go and play in Saudi. Speculation is intensifying that Duran may leave Villa Park two years after he joined the club with Saudi Pro League side Al-Nassr keen on a deal.

arts.ttl: SPFL head scout's 'regret' at losing a 'mini-Mark Hughes' to Celtic, he scored goals for fun
arts.sum: Ayr United head scout Ray Pattison was the man who discovered Ben Doak and says he regrets the day he lost the talented player to Celtic . Ben Doak signing for Celtic is ‘the ultimate one that got away’ from Ayr United
